name: Bind Multiple Volumes to LXC
description: Bind multiple host directories to an LXC container (idempotent).

parameters.name: ID of the LXC Container
parameters.description: LXC container ID to bind volumes to.

parameters.name: Hostname
parameters.description: Container hostname; used in volume directory paths.

parameters.name: Volume Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage ID for managed app volume.

parameters.name: Addon Volumes
parameters.description: Additional volumes from addons (merged with base volumes).

parameters.name: Mapped UID (Host)
parameters.description: UID mapping on the host for unprivileged containers

parameters.name: Mapped GID (Host)
parameters.description: GID mapping on the host for unprivileged containers

parameters.name: Previous VM ID
parameters.description: Previous container VMID for upgrade/reconfigure (to find existing app volume)

commands.description: Executes the script to bind multiple volumes in the container.
